zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Edmund Weston於1436年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾波斯頓時，他的父親Peter Weston26歲，母親Agnes Dawney32歲。他於大約1465年與Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford在澤西島結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1509年10月15日在他的家鄉享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Edmund Weston于1436年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾波斯頓时，他的父亲Peter Weston26岁，母亲Agnes Dawney32岁。他于大约1465年与Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford在泽西岛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1509年10月15日在他的家乡享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Edmund Weston was born in 1436, in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Peter Weston, was 26 and his mother, Agnes Dawney, was 32. He married Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford about 1465, in Jersey. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 October 1509, in his hometown, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Edmund Weston est né en 1436, à Boston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Peter Weston, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Dawney, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford environ 1465, à Jersey. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1509, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Edmund Weston 1436 in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter Weston 26 und seine Mutter Agnes Dawney 32. Er hat um 1465 in Jersey Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1509 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Edmund Weston è nato il nel 1436 nel Boston, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Peter Weston, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Dawney, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford circa 1465, nel Jersey. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 ottobre 1509, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Edmund Westonが1436年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボストンで生まれた時，父Peter Westonは26歳，母Agnes Dawneyは32歳であった。約1465年にジャージーでCatherine Camell Lady of Fiddlefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1509年10月15日に故郷で73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Edmund Weston(이)가 1436년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 보스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Weston(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Dawney(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1465년 저지에서 Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1509년 10월 15일 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Edmund Weston nasceu em 1436, em Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Peter Weston, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Dawney, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford aproximadamente 1465, em Jérsei. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1509, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Edmund Weston родился в 1436 г. в местности бостон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Peter Weston было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Dawney, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford около 1465 г. в местности Джерси. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 октября 1509 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Edmund Weston nació en 1436, en Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Peter Weston, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes Dawney, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford aproximadamente 1465, en Jersey. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1509, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años.
